title: Willenhall Pride in Place Survey — Mary Creagh CBE Labour MP
headings: h2: Sign up for my email newsletter below
text_excerpt: Willenhall Pride in Place Survey — Mary Creagh CBE Labour MP 0 Skip to Content Mary Creagh CBE Labour MP About News Contact Willenhall Pride in Place Survey Subscribe To My Newsletter Open Menu Close Menu Mary Creagh CBE Labour MP About News Contact Willenhall Pride in Place Survey Subscribe To My Newsletter Open Menu Close Menu About News Contact Willenhall Pride in Place Survey Subscribe To My Newsletter Willenhall Survey Pride in Place “I worked hard to secure £20 million for Willenhall. Now you get to decide how it’s spent. Please take a few minutes to fill out this survey. I want to know how you’d make Willenhall better.” - Mary Creagh CBE MP. Please only complete this survey if you live in the Willenhall area. If you live or work in Willenhall, you can apply to join the Neighbourhood Board to help deliver this opportunity. Please complete the last box of the survey to find out how.
